buddy_connection: Hey! {buddy_name} mentioned they'd love to catch up with you. 💙
{buddy_name} is online right now—want to say hi?

positive_reinforcement: Your commitment is inspiring. Keep going!
Proud of how far you've come. You've got this! ⭐

buddy_suggestion_isolation: Feeling down? Connecting with friends can help. Want to reach out to {buddy_name}?
You're not alone. {num_buddies} people in your network care about you.
